title: index out of range when unmask=[]
body:
### Issue Description

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/6856c7717d63d610b59c7600f04b94b6992f29dc/pkg/specgen/generate/oci_linux.go#L60


### Steps to reproduce the issue

call api to create a container with `unmask=[]`

### Describe the results you received

error 500 Internal Server Error - runtime error: index out of range [0] with length 0: runtime error: index out of range [0] with length 0

### Describe the results you expected

no error
